<!--
PR title must follow Conventional Commits, matching your branch prefix:

  feat: <what you added>
  fix: <what you fixed>
  ui: <UI/UX change>
  chore: <build, deps, tooling>
  ops: <ops, distribution, scripts>
  security: <security fix or hardening>
  docs: <docs only>
  refactor: <refactor without behavior change>

Branch name must be: <prefix>/<short-slug>  (e.g. feat/sticker-reactions)
-->

## Summary
<!-- One or two lines: what changes and why. Reads like a changelog entry. -->

## Why
<!-- Motivation, context, link to issue or thread. Skip "what" — the diff shows that. -->

## Test plan
<!-- How you verified this works. Telegram bot UX changes need real screenshots. -->
- [ ] 

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows `<prefix>/<slug>`
- [ ] PR title matches `<prefix>: <description>`
- [ ] Single logical change
- [ ] Did not modify `VERSION`, `version.py`, `.github/workflows/`, or `CODEOWNERS` (owner-only)
- [ ] Commit messages in English, present tense
